demo-vintage-cameras.name: Vintage cameras under $50
demo-vintage-cameras.narrative: Collectibles category with mixed auction and Buy-It-Now listings. Exercises sponsored-result skipping and auction filtering.

demo-wireless-headphones.name: Wireless headphones under $75
demo-wireless-headphones.narrative: High-volume category with variant selection (color, connectivity) and pagination — exercises the variants service end to end.

demo-retro-gaming.name: Retro game consoles under $100
demo-retro-gaming.narrative: Active auction category — validates that the flow only picks up fixed-price items and skips live auctions cleanly.

demo-mechanical-keyboards.name: Mechanical keyboards under $150
demo-mechanical-keyboards.narrative: Price-range listings ($X to $Y format) and variant pickers (switch type, layout) — exercises the currency-parser range fallback.

demo-coffee-grinders.name: Coffee grinders under $40
demo-coffee-grinders.narrative: Listings priced across USD and CAD sellers; cart drawer vs page split — validates that the cart service normalises both.
